CustomField.formula: "# 1:"&HYPERLINK("https://forcecom175.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/contact_schedule__c/"& property_4_1__c &"/view", property_4_1_name__c )&BR() &"# 2:"&HYPERLINK("https://forcecom175.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/contact_schedule__c/"& property_4_2__c &"/view", property_4_2_name__c)&BR() &"# 3:"&HYPERLINK("https://forcecom175.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/contact_schedule__c/"& property_4_3__c &"/view", property_4_3_name__c)
CustomField.label: 4月_物件名(*レポート用)
